title: Pet Improvements
description: Simple changes to tamed entity mechanics and behaviors.
body:
Current features:
- Wolves and Cats have a customizable wandering state.
- Wolves when in attack mode is immune to player attacks.
- New custom pet bed block.
- Tamed wolves, cats, and parrots can be bound to the pet bed and respawn when dead.
- Configs for mod features (requires YACL).
